steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word “but” signals an unexpected reversal: a damaged fossil should provide less information, yet this broken area actually did provide something valuable (fresh insight).

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank requires a verb meaning “provided” or “made available.” “Offered” directly conveys that the broken area yielded fresh insight.

The other three choices either misexpress the action (resolved = solved a problem, adjusted = modified something, directed = aimed something) and don't naturally fit the context of providing insight.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
